modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to request an IP address for new building controls.

full_description_text: So, during the call, the user mentioned they’re setting up a new Network Automation Engine, right? They need an IP address to get it connected and report back to the Metasys server. It’s for the building controls at Johnson Controls, and they’re really looking to get this sorted out quickly. Just a straightforward request for that IP address to keep everything running smoothly.
short_description: Need to request an IP address for new building controls.
description: So, during the call, the user mentioned they’re setting up a new Network Automation Engine, right? They need an IP address to get it connected and report back to the Metasys server. It’s for the building controls at Johnson Controls, and they’re really looking to get this sorted out quickly. Just a straightforward request for that IP address to keep everything running smoothly.
